steps.name: load_project_manifest
steps.rationale: Project identity must exist before any derived packet.

steps.name: load_world_packet
steps.rationale: World anchors define valid location and rule references.

steps.name: load_character_roster
steps.rationale: Character packets depend on the project identity.

steps.name: load_scene_request
steps.rationale: Scene packets require project, world, and character anchors.

steps.name: derive_episode_and_continuity
steps.rationale: Episode and continuity packets are derived after scene intent is known.

steps.name: derive_reveal_projection
steps.rationale: Reveal projection depends on scene intent and continuity policy.
